interactions.description: Full app renders on initial load
interactions.expected: Dark background (#0a0a1a). Left toolbar visible with MODE and SHAPE sections. Center canvas with grid lines. Right panel showing PROPERTIES and AGENTS headers. Bottom area: AGENT INBOX header, course correction input with 'All agents' dropdown and green Send button, OPERATIONS section, status bar with 'Zoom: 100%' and '0 elements'. No blank/purple page. No console errors crashing the tree.

Vertical toolbar on left edge. Two groups: MODE (select triangle icon in accent purple, pointer hand icon) and SHAPE (rectangle, circle, text T, line). Below: UI section with Btn, card, list, grid icons. Active tool highlighted with accent color (#7c3aed) background. Icons visible and not clipped.

Horizontal bar spanning full width. Left: 'All agents' dropdown select. Center: text input with placeholder 'Course correction...'. Right: green (#00ff88) 'Send' button. NVIS styling — dark background, dim borders.
Input focused with visible cursor. Border or outline changes to indicate focus state (accent color or brighter border).
Panel header 'AGENTS' with count badge showing '0'. Below: 'No agents connected' dim text. Panel width ~260px, dark secondary background.
Panel header 'PROPERTIES' in uppercase. Below: 'Select an element to edit its properties' dim centered text. Same width and background as agent panel.
Header 'OPERATIONS' with 'All agents' filter dropdown on right. Below: 'No operations yet' dim centered text.
Full-width bar at very bottom. Shows 'Zoom: 100%' on left and '0 elements' next to it. Dark background, small dim text (~11px).

AGENTS header with count badge showing '2' or more. List of agents: 'test-navbar' with green (#00ff88) color dot and 'idle' status, 'test-card' with blue (#44aaff) color dot and 'idle' status. Each agent shows name, colored indicator, and status text.

interactions.description: Mode tabs visible in top bar
interactions.expected: Top bar shows 'UX Lab' brand followed by 'Canvas' and 'Annotate' tabs. Canvas tab active by default with ACCENT (#7c3aed) underline. Annotate tab is DIM (#505050).

Annotate tab now has ACCENT underline. Canvas/toolbar/right-panel replaced by AnnotationView. Progress bar visible at top. Label bar with 5 entity chips. Token annotation area in center. Decision buttons at bottom.

Dark background (#0a0a1a). Top: progress bar showing '0 / 10 completed' and 'Item 1 of 10'. Below: label bar with 5 chips (CONTROL_ID green, TECHNIQUE blue, TACTIC amber, THREAT red, EVIDENCE purple). Center: token annotation card with words from first annotation item. Right sidebar: SPARTA Context panel (tactic, technique, controls) and Source panel (collection, doc ID, page, confidence). Bottom: Accept (green), Reject (red), Skip (dim) buttons.
5 chips in a row: CONTROL_ID (#00ff88), TECHNIQUE (#44aaff), TACTIC (#ffaa00), THREAT (#ff4444), EVIDENCE (#7c3aed). Each has keyboard shortcut number (1-5). All initially outline-only (no fill).
CONTROL_ID chip now has filled green background. Other chips remain outline-only.
Three buttons centered: '✓ Accept A' (green border, green tint), '✗ Reject R' (red border, red tint), '→ Skip S' (dim border). Each shows keyboard shortcut letter.

interactions.description: SPARTA context panel for current item
interactions.expected: Header 'SPARTA Context'. Fields: Tactic (amber badge 'Harden'), Technique (blue badge 'Credential Hardening'), Controls (green badge 'Access Control'). Related Controls section with green-bordered chips: AC-2(1), AC-2(2), AC-2(3), AC-2(4), IA-2.
Header 'Source'. Fields: Collection 'NIST SP 800-53r5', Doc ID 'sp800-53r5-ac-2', Page '42', Confidence '95%' (green). Green confidence bar nearly full.
Text showing '0 / 10 completed' left, 'Item 1 of 10' right. Below: empty progress bar track (no colored segments yet since nothing accepted/rejected/skipped).
